footer.description: We create innovative music technology that empowers musicians worldwide to achieve their creative vision.

hero.title: Unleash Your Musical Potential
hero.subtitle: Professional-grade guitar amps, effects, and music creation tools — designed for musicians who demand excellence.

features.sectionSubtitle: Discover what makes our products stand out from the crowd

tone.title: World-Class Tone
tone.description: Experience authentic amp tones powered by our proprietary BIAS modeling technology. From vintage warmth to modern high-gain, every nuance is captured with stunning accuracy.

portable.title: Play Anywhere
portable.description: Our smart amps and pedals are designed for life on the move. Lightweight, battery-powered, and Bluetooth-enabled — your studio goes wherever you go.

community.title: Global Community
community.description: Join over 3 million musicians on ToneCloud. Share presets, discover new sounds, and connect with artists from around the world.

software.title: Powerful Software
software.description: BIAS FX 2, BIAS Amp 2, and our suite of plugins integrate seamlessly with your favorite DAW. Professional results without the professional price tag.

guitarist.quote: The Spark amp completely changed how I practice. The smart jam feature is like having a band that follows you perfectly.
guitarist.author: Marcus Chen

producer.quote: BIAS FX 2 is my go-to plugin for guitar tracks. The tone quality rivals hardware that costs ten times more.
producer.author: Sarah Lindberg

teacher.quote: I recommend Spark to all my students. The built-in lessons and backing tracks make practice fun and effective.
teacher.author: Takeshi Yamamoto

newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.description: Get the latest news on product releases, exclusive deals, and tips from pro musicians delivered straight to your inbox.
newsletter.disclaimer: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

products.pageDescription: Explore our complete lineup of smart amps, effects pedals, and music software designed for every level of musician.

spark40.name: Spark 40
spark40.description: The ultimate smart guitar amp with 40 watts of power. Features Smart Jam, Auto Chords, and access to over 50,000 tones on ToneCloud.

sparkMini.name: Spark MINI
sparkMini.description: Big tone in a tiny package. 10-watt portable amp with rechargeable battery, Bluetooth audio streaming, and all the smart features you love.

sparkGo.name: Spark GO
sparkGo.description: The world's smallest smart amp. Fits in your palm, delivers incredible tone. Perfect for practice anywhere, anytime.

biasFx2.name: BIAS FX 2
biasFx2.description: Professional guitar effects processor plugin. 200+ effects, 32 amps, and an intuitive signal chain interface for your DAW.

biasAmp2.name: BIAS Amp 2
biasAmp2.description: Design your dream amp from scratch. Amp Match technology lets you clone any real amp tone with scientific precision.

riff.name: Riff
riff.description: Audio interface designed for guitarists. Ultra-low latency, premium converters, and seamless integration with our software ecosystem.

products.noResults: No products found matching your criteria.
products.addedToCart: {product} has been added to your cart.

about.pageDescription: We're on a mission to make music creation accessible, inspiring, and fun for everyone.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2010, Positive Grid started with a simple idea: use cutting-edge technology to make professional-quality music tools accessible to everyone. What began as a small team of engineers and musicians has grown into a global company serving millions of creators.
story.paragraph2: Our breakthrough came with the development of BIAS technology — a proprietary amp modeling system that captures the authentic behavior of real tube amplifiers. This technology powers everything we build, from our award-winning software plugins to our revolutionary Spark smart amps.
story.paragraph3: Today, Positive Grid products are used by bedroom guitarists, touring professionals, and everyone in between. We're proud to have built a community of over 3 million musicians across 120 countries who share our passion for great tone and innovative technology.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: We're a diverse team of musicians, engineers, and designers united by our love for music and technology.

ceo.name: Yolanda Chiang
ceo.bio: Yolanda leads Positive Grid with a vision to democratize music creation through technology.

cto.name: Jay Yang
cto.bio: Jay architects the core DSP and machine learning technology behind our products.

design.name: Kelly Wu
design.bio: Kelly ensures every product delivers an intuitive and delightful user experience.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. It may have been moved or no longer exists.
